entries.title: Knowledge OS — PostgreSQL Compatibility Plan
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24E; moved under knowledge-os/implementation/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). PR-1/2/3 SHIPPED: the Knowledge OS domain is dual-target SQLite+Postgres (pgx/v5 in go.mod, pgvector searcher present). Legacy domains remain SQLite-only as the doc states. Active and implementation-backed; complements active workspace-knowledge-os.

entries.title: Knowledge OS — Production Hardening Goals
verified_against: 7/10 goals shipped with code+tests per doc
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24H; moved under knowledge-os/implementation/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Operator dashboard for 10 production-hardening goals; 7 shipped end-to-end with code+tests (verified artifacts exist), 3 designed/deferred -> partial. (Some cited artifacts e.g. knowledge_cost.go have moved out of the internal/store root.)

entries.title: Knowledge OS — Retrieval Soak Runbook
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24D; moved under knowledge-os/runbooks/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Operator runbook for the retrieval soak harness; the soak code (internal/workspace_knowledge/soak) and TestSoak exist and re-run in CI. The generated RETRIEVAL_SOAK_REPORT.md now writes to the gitignored artifacts/retrieval-soak/ dir (DOCS-R2 resolved) and is no longer a registered spec.

entries.title: Knowledge OS — Technical Contract
verified_against: retrieval-soak-runbook proves a working retrieval substrate
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24D; promoted to knowledge-platform/features/knowledge-os/technical.md in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). KnowledgeOS backend (org-scoped assets -> retrieval -> context assembly) is implemented under internal/workspace_knowledge. Later vector-DB port-swap (pgvector/Qdrant) and some L5-L7 layers are deferred per the doc, but the core foundation is real and backed by the soak harness.
